no_claim_reason: Same-server timing is measured directly on one host, but this lightweight harness only validates Spectre returncode/log success. Paper-facing claims still need waveform/checker validation and repeated cold/warm runs.
evas_only_no_claim_reason: EVAS-only speed experiments are candidate evidence; paper-facing speed claims require same-slice EVAS/Spectre timing.
